title: helichrysum mollifolium
intro: Helichrysum mollifolium, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils containing compounds like sesquiterpenes and esters. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum mollifolium have been linked to various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and protection against oxidative stress. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as used in aromatherapy, allowing individuals to harness its potential benefits.
